text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after going to a video rental shop with
Fine Motion...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Princess Fighter was so good! I can see why you
love it so much, Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If even someone descended from real princesses
approves, then Princess Fighter really is the
greatest!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the movie you choose will be amazing
too! ♪
choice_data_list: You two seem like you're having fun.
You two seem like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Japanese films and animations are
so interesting.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami and I are planning to watch a film I
pick out today.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh! Would it be okay for my trainer to join us?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
By all means! Movies are more exciting the more
people you watch with.
choice_data_list: Then I guess I'll take you up on that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, all right! ♪ I'm going to choose something
special just for the two of you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's time for our grand movie night to begin! Fine,
if you please. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I've chosen a romance film! The title is...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shogun Shark Returns ! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, What a strangely catchy title! I admit I'm
also not sure where the romance will come into
play!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The cover just looked so interesting. And the title
makes it sound like a sequel even though it's not!
choice_data_list: It's clearly a B mov—ah, nevermind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at their beaming faces, I can't bring
myself to put a damper on their enthusiasm, so we
start the movie.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Are those girls falling from the sky?!
No, wait—it's pouring sharks!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The problem is that top-ranking officials aren't
acting in this time of emergency. While they're
busy trying to shift responsibility, the sharks keep
coming!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! The island is floating! No way! Are you
telling me the whole island is a defense facility?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The tables have turned now! Nail them with the
love missile!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Shogun or not, it's still a shark... Sure enough, it
looks like they might be able to kill the sharks
with fire!

text_block_list.name: Fine and Kawakami
text_block_list.text: GET 'EM!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That... was... phenomenal! What a splendid piece
of cinema.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shogun Shark Returns truly is a masterpiece! Don't you agree, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Your taste in movies surprised me.
Your taste in movies surprised me.
Maybe we should watch something else too...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shogun Shark Returns truly is a masterpiece! Don't you agree, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Your taste in movies surprised me.
Your taste in movies surprised me.
Maybe we should watch something else too...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I really loved the succession of wild plot
twists and how you never knew when the shogun
was going to show up!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
From beginning to end, it was action-packed and
so... free-form!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Every film I've watched until now was aimed at
teaching customs, ideologies, or history. This was
a breath of fresh air!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And it was so fun watching it together with
everyone, laughing and shouting at the screen!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't agree more! I'd be honored to join you
for another movie whenever you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it was inevitable that someone under as
many constraints as Fine Motion would be drawn
to an uninhibited B movie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy she's discovered yet one more thing to
love.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay. How about... Revival of the Zombie Kingdom, Bizarre Tales: Catch the Golden Kappa! , or Mecha-Umamusume ?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There are many more films I'm interested in
watching too, so we're not lacking for choice!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Maybe I should tell everyone back in Ireland
about the best ones. I'm sure they would broaden
their horizons. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's just like you, Fine! I'd like to request that
you include Princess Fighter on that list too!
choice_data_list: M-maybe we shouldn't be too hasty...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad that Fine Motion is enjoying Japanese
films. All the same...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm determined to get her to watch a wider range
of genres before her recommendations get too
slanted.
